conbody.p: This section provides information about issues that were resolved in release 25.3.

section.title: Resolved Issues in Juniper Cloud-Native Router Release 25.3

li.p: JCNR-12209: In a static VXLAN deployment between VXLAN Tunnel Endpoints (VTEPs), traffic drop is no longer observed if the layer 2 application pods are restarted—With static VXLAN configured between VTEP devices , the VXLAN network identifiers (VNI) are now correctly reprogrammed when the layer 2 application pods are restarted. No traffic drop is observed.

JCNR-12220: When static VXLAN is configured using a configlet, deleting the configlet in a running deployment deletes the logical tunnel (lt) interfaces—With running traffic, deleting a configlet that configured static VXLAN on the Cloud-Native Router now results in deletion of the lt interfaces. This is expected behavior.
